name: Click Window
desc: Player clicks in an inventory window. Handles item moves, pickup, shifts, swaps, etc.

fields.name: windowId
fields.desc: The window ID being clicked in

fields.name: actionNumber
fields.desc: Sequential number for the action (transaction ID)

fields.name: clickedItem
fields.desc: The item in the clicked slot

notes: The server validates the action and returns a confirm packet (S31/WindowItems). If the client action fails validation, the server can send S32PacketConfirmTransaction to reject it and revert the client inventory.

implementation.pattern: Usually NOT constructed directly — modules use mc.playerController.windowClick() which sends C0E internally. Disabler cancels C0E to prevent server from detecting fast inventory actions.
